mapper.sql: select banner_id, banner_title, banner_img, banner_link, banner_desc, banner_status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_at from cafe_banner
mapper.select: where banner_id = #{bannerId} and delete_at IS NULL
mapper.insert:
insert into cafe_banner
banner_title, banner_img, banner_link, banner_desc, banner_status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_at,
#{bannerTitle}, #{bannerImg}, #{bannerLink}, #{bannerDesc}, #{bannerStatus}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{deleteAt},

insert into cafe_banner
banner_title, banner_img, banner_link, banner_desc, banner_status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_at,
values
(
#{item.bannerTitle}, #{item.bannerImg}, #{item.bannerLink}, #{item.bannerDesc}, #{item.bannerStatus}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.deleteAt},
)

insert ignore into cafe_banner
banner_title, banner_img, banner_link, banner_desc, banner_status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_at,
values
(
#{item.bannerTitle}, #{item.bannerImg}, #{item.bannerLink}, #{item.bannerDesc}, #{item.bannerStatus}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.deleteAt},
)
mapper.update:
update cafe_banner
banner_title = #{bannerTitle}, banner_img = #{bannerImg}, banner_link = #{bannerLink}, banner_desc = #{bannerDesc}, banner_status = #{bannerStatus}, create_by = #{createBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_at = #{deleteAt},
where banner_id = #{bannerId} and delete_at IS NULL

update.foreach:
update cafe_banner
banner_title = #{item.bannerTitle}, banner_img = #{item.bannerImg}, banner_link = #{item.bannerLink}, banner_desc = #{item.bannerDesc}, banner_status = #{item.bannerStatus}, create_by = #{item.createBy}, create_time = #{item.createTime}, update_by = #{item.updateBy}, update_time = #{item.updateTime}, delete_at = #{item.deleteAt},
where banner_id = #{item.bannerId} and delete_at IS NULL

mapper.update: update cafe_banner set delete_at = now() where banner_id = #{bannerId} and delete_at IS NULL
